title: monanthes icterica
intro: Monanthes icterica, also known as bitter leaf or bitter asparagus, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating liver and gallbladder disorders, due to its bitter compounds that stimulate bile production. The health benefits of Monanthes icterica include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in treating various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Monanthes icterica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a dried or fresh herb in cooking and medicinal applications.
